---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Run `archlens analyze ...`
2. Open page X
3. Click Y
4. See error

## Expected behavior
What should have happened.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened. Include error messages, screenshots, or logs.

## Environment
- **OS:** (macOS 14, Ubuntu 22, Windows 11, etc.)
- **Node version:** (`node --version`)
- **pnpm version:** (`pnpm --version`)
- **ArchLens version:** (`archlens --version` or commit SHA)
- **Browser:** (if web dashboard issue)

## Project being analyzed
- **Language:** (TypeScript, Python, etc.)
- **Size:** (~ files, ~ LOC)
- **Public repo URL:** (if possible — helps reproduction)

## Additional context
Any other relevant info: console errors, network tab screenshots, related issues, etc.
